title: 魔法少女甜心3D Magical Girl Sweetheart 3D
description:
💖 Magical Girl Sweetheart is invited all over the world to cast magical spells. 

✨ Turn every scene into a dessert-themed paradise with a link-match gameplay. 

🏠 20 major scenes, each with 3 transformation stages. 

🐘 Over 430 unique desserts in total. 

📦 Fresh and distinctive visual transformations. 

👀 Tap or drag matching items—dual control options bring varied gameplay experiences. 

📖 Browse and compare fully transformed scenes easily as they grow sweeter and sweeter. 

⏳ No time limits or penalty systems. 

🏆 Unlock all achievements with ease.
description_short: Magical Girl Sweetheart turns all scenes into dessert-themed wonderlands with match-link gameplay. There are 20 major scenes, each containing 3 renovation stages, with over 430 different desserts in total. There are no time limits, and players can unlock all achievements easily.
